workflow.name: define-ontology
workflow.description: Edit ontology/schema.json — Single Source of Truth (classes, relationships, constraints).

workflow.name: apply-ontology
workflow.description: TypeScript loads schema.json for AI Cypher prompts and guardrails; Neo4j uses neo4j.mapping.json.

vibeCode.rule: Business logic changes only in ontology/schema.json; restart dev after ontology edits.
